issues.description: Rest action is incorrect. Blocker ability auto-rests the card when declared as attack target. The [On Block] trigger should NOT include Rest in its actions—Rest already happened via Blocker mechanic.
Missing condition: effect requires resting 2 DON!! cards as a cost. Must add condition to check HasAttachedDon with count >= 2.
SearchDeck filter is incomplete. Must specify filter to target DON!! cards only (filter should match DON!! card type/kind).
'board' is ambiguous for DON!!. Should be 'active' to match 'set it as active' in card text.
